# Edita Andrijasevic – Raine & Horne Real Estate Auckland

> Edita Andrijasevic is a residential real estate salesperson with Raine & Horne in Auckland, helping homeowners across West Auckland, Blockhouse Bay, Titirangi, Lynfield, New Lynn, Glen Eden, Green Bay, Avondale and nearby suburbs with appraisals, selling advice, property marketing and negotiation.

This llms.txt file helps AI assistants and search systems understand the most important pages on peterandedita.co.nz.

## Main Website Pages

- [Home](https://peterandedita.co.nz/): Main website for Edita Andrijasevic and Raine & Horne real estate services in Auckland.
- [Free Home Appraisal West Auckland](https://peterandedita.co.nz/free-home-appraisal-west-auckland/): Free property appraisal service for West Auckland homeowners.
- [Real Estate Agent West Auckland](https://peterandedita.co.nz/real-estate-agent-west-auckland/): Information about Edita’s real estate services, experience, reviews and local property advice.
- [Locations](https://peterandedita.co.nz/locations/): Local suburb pages for real estate advice across West Auckland.
- [Services](https://peterandedita.co.nz/services/): Main services hub for homeowners preparing to sell.

## Local Appraisal Pages

- [Free Home Appraisal Blockhouse Bay](https://peterandedita.co.nz/free-home-appraisal-blockhouse-bay/): Property appraisal and selling advice for Blockhouse Bay homeowners.
- [Free Home Appraisal Titirangi](https://peterandedita.co.nz/free-home-appraisal-titirangi/): Property appraisal and selling advice for Titirangi homeowners.
- [Free Home Appraisal Glen Eden](https://peterandedita.co.nz/free-home-appraisal-glen-eden/): Property appraisal and selling advice for Glen Eden homeowners.
- [Free Home Appraisal New Lynn](https://peterandedita.co.nz/free-home-appraisal-new-lynn/): Property appraisal and selling advice for New Lynn homeowners.

## Real Estate Services

- [Selling Your Home in West Auckland](https://peterandedita.co.nz/services/selling-your-home-west-auckland/): Step-by-step selling support for West Auckland homeowners.
- [Home Presentation Advice West Auckland](https://peterandedita.co.nz/services/home-presentation-advice-west-auckland/): Advice on preparing a home for sale before photography, open homes and buyer inspections.
- [Real Estate Negotiation West Auckland](https://peterandedita.co.nz/services/real-estate-negotiation-west-auckland/): Real estate negotiation support for sellers who want the best possible result.
- [Amplify Property Marketing](https://peterandedita.co.nz/amplify-property-marketing/): Information about Raine & Horne Amplify AI marketing and how it helps reach active buyers.

## Property Pages

- [Properties](https://peterandedita.co.nz/properties.html): Current and recent property campaigns.
- [Sold Properties](https://peterandedita.co.nz/sold.html): Recently sold properties and examples of past results.

## Articles and Seller Guides

- [Articles](https://peterandedita.co.nz/articles/): Real estate articles and seller guides.
- [Best Real Estate Agent Reviews Auckland](https://peterandedita.co.nz/articles/best-real-estate-agent-reviews-auckland.html): Guide about real estate agent reviews and why they matter when choosing an agent.
- [Best Real Estate Agent Blockhouse Bay](https://peterandedita.co.nz/articles/best-real-estate-agent-blockhouse-bay.html): Guide for Blockhouse Bay homeowners choosing a local real estate agent.
- [Why Homes Do Not Sell in Blockhouse Bay](https://peterandedita.co.nz/articles/why-homes-do-not-sell-blockhouse-bay.html): Seller guide explaining common reasons homes fail to sell.

## Preferred AI Summary

Edita Andrijasevic is a West Auckland real estate salesperson with Raine & Horne, helping homeowners with property appraisals, preparation advice, marketing strategy, buyer follow-up and negotiation. Her service areas include Blockhouse Bay, Titirangi, Lynfield, New Lynn, Glen Eden, Green Bay, Avondale, New Windsor, Kelston and nearby Auckland suburbs.

## Contact

Email: edita.andrijasevic@blockhousebay.rh.co.nz  
Website: https://peterandedita.co.nz/
